title: what Eva unit you want to be real
display_title: what Eva unit you want to be real
wikitext:
[]: what Eva unit you want to be real?             Quote Post by eva unit05 » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:12 pm I am asking which Eva you want to be real!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:15 pm [url]http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4012&highlight=[/url] What is your problem, dude? Please settle down, for all our sakes. And it wouldn't be a good idea to make Reichu Tenchou angry, now would it?

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit05 » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:29 pm Action_Bastard wrote: [url]http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4012&highlight=[/url] What is your problem, dude? Please settle down, for all our sakes. And it wouldn't be a good idea to make Reichu Tenchou angry, now would it?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Jan 10, 2009 3:46 pm None of them. That would be too scary. Oh great, now I'm all freaked out. Someone hold me, please.

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit05 » Sat Jan 10, 2009 4:58 pm BrikHaus wrote: None of them. That would be too scary. Oh great, now I'm all freaked out. Someone hold me, please.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 10, 2009 5:29 pm If they were real, they would probably just collapse in on themselves, and that would be that. (Anime mecha/creature design usually doesn't let itself be constrained in any way by the same laws that have prevented things like scrawny, extremely heavy, 40 meter tall bipeds capable of sprinting and leaping from ever naturally evolving on this planet.) So, for the Evas' own sake, they should be glad they aren't real. Though, I suppose you could always wish for NGE's twisted version of physics to be real, too. But, that permitted, all we'd get is stupid governments and regimes using Evas as WMDs in their shitty wars over oil, religion, racial profile, and whatever else. So my answer is "none".

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sat Jan 10, 2009 5:35 pm They'd make excellent construction workers, mind. It'd be like a kid playing with an Erector set.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Jan 10, 2009 8:37 pm Reichu wrote: But, that permitted, all we'd get is stupid governments and regimes using Evas as WMDs in their shitty wars over oil, religion, racial profile, and whatever else. So my answer is "none".

[]:             Quote Post by Deathmask » Sat Jan 10, 2009 9:04 pm My answer would depend on what country would own it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 10, 2009 9:43 pm It would be interesting for the Eva to be real, but they probably would just be used for the government related work that Reichu mentioned. And that'd be no fun, especially in general with the Eva snapping when pissed off...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 10, 2009 10:08 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: And that'd be no fun, especially in general with the Eva snapping when pissed off...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 11, 2009 1:18 pm The Eva rebelling would be cool, I just wouldn't wanna be around for the destruction. (I'd be cheering them on though. ;) )

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Mon Jan 12, 2009 12:05 am ROW ROW FIGHT DA POWAH! Reichu wrote: My answer is "none".

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Mon Jan 12, 2009 8:53 am I Think Just from the design,appeareance and style +colour i Like The MP Eva series the most. If it would be possible i would like to see them once *dreaming*

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Mon Jan 12, 2009 4:03 pm Do I have to live in Tokyo-3?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Jan 12, 2009 9:13 pm I wish unit 01 was real so it could defend the earth against comets

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon May 25, 2009 6:59 pm The Harpies cuz I would climb into the plug and play around with all the Dummy Plug Kaworus ;D

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 25, 2009 7:06 pm None of them. If they were real that would be a lot of responsibility. Each step from an Eva in real world physics should be able to cause earthquakes. Also constant damage cost may put the world in an economic depression with all the research, and modifications that would come with having a real world Eva.
